title: Stainless Steel Frying Basket with Handle Mesh - French Chip Deep Frying Basket (18cm)
features: [Frying Basket]A frying basket strainer with handle, available in a variety of sizes, allows you to cook a variety of fried foods, cereals or pasta for the whole family at once.
[304 Stainless Steel Material]Our frying basket is made of 304 stainless steel. Its sleek and sturdy design ensures longevity and safe contact with food.

[Handle Design]The ergonomic handle is easy to grip. It protects your hands from burns. Perfect for your favourite chips, vegetables, meats and more. It allows you to cook, stew or fry food with ease.

[Multi-functional]The funnel holes are evenly distributed, so you can heat your food evenly and eat healthier, and it also filters water effectively, so it can be used as a frying basket, draining basket, etc., to meet a variety of needs.
[Easy to Clean]Cleaning our frying basket is a breeze. Simply wash it with water and detergent, and it is also dishwasher safe.
description: Features: This frying basket makes it easy to put food in and take it out of the hot water or oil. Simple structure, smooth surface, easy to clean, also dishwasher safe. Made of high quality 304 stainless steel with brushed finish, durable, high temperature resistant, non-toxic and harmless, you can rest assured of long-term use. Ideal for DIY chips, crisps, onion rings, roast chicken, can also be used as a fruit and vegetable colander. Specifications: Colour: silver Shape: round Material: 304 stainless steel Dishwasher safe: Yes Diameter: 14cm/16cm/18cm/20cm (optional) Package included: : 1*frying basket Notes: 1. Due to the different monitor and light effect, the actual color of the item might be slightly different from the color showed on the pictures. Thank you! 2. Please allow 1-3cm measuring deviation due to manual measurement.
